Cat Boss · Cat-Themed & Pet-Friendly Restaurant

Cat Boss Cafe (貓老闆咖啡)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4
📍 Dali District, Taichung📅 2026
Italian Casual Dining Cafe Pet-friendly
If you’re hanging out in Taichung’s Dali District, make sure to swing by Cat Boss (貓老闆咖啡). It’s a super chill, cat-themed, pet-friendly cafe right on Dali Road, just a short walk from Dali Sports Park. The stars of the show are the many friendly rescue cats roaming around, always ready for some attention while you enjoy your meal. You can even pick up some cat treats in-store to win them over! While you can bring your own pets, the vibe here is definitely all about the cats. The menu is packed with comfort food like pasta and risotto, but they also do great fried snacks, waffles, and croffles. Their house coffee is excellent, and you shouldn’t miss their "milk cap" (奶蓋) drinks—creamy, salty-sweet foam tea topped with the cutest cat-themed latte art. If you're hungry, their *jiancan* (簡餐)—traditional Taiwanese set meals served with rice, soup, and several side dishes—are great value and really filling. Best of all, there’s no time limit on weekdays and they have power outlets everywhere, so it's a solid spot to get some work done. The only requirement is a minimum spend of at least one drink. Perfect for cat lovers, remote workers looking for a laptop-friendly spot, casual get-togethers, and families with kids (just remember to follow the cafe’s rules for interacting with our furry friends!).
Good for Cat lovers Casual get-togethers Families with kids

What I ordered

Creamy Spinach Vegan Pasta (NT$210) Coconut Chicken Rice (weekday-only set meal, NT$260)

Restaurant info

Address No. 109, Dali Rd., Dali Dist., Taichung City 412, Taiwan Open in Google Maps →
Phone04-2485-1983
Hours11:30-19:30
ClosedMondays
ReservationsReservations accepted (booking recommended on weekends)
ServiceOne-drink minimum, no time limit on weekdays, power outlets available, takeout available
DietaryVegan 純素選項
PriceUS$7-13 / person
CuisineItalian・Casual Dining・Cafe・Pet-friendly
